scripts.crawl:solana:dune:year: pnpm run build && dotenv -e ../../.env -e .env -- node dist/index.js crawl solana --from-year 2024 --to-year 2024 --top 10 --dune --dune-period year --dune-window-days 1 --out /tmp/taxmaxi-dune-year --json
scripts.crawl:solana:dune:quarter: pnpm run build && dotenv -e ../../.env -e .env -- node dist/index.js crawl solana --from-year 2024 --to-year 2024 --top 5 --dune --dune-period quarter --dune-window-days 1 --out /tmp/taxmaxi-dune-quarter --json
scripts.clean: rm -rf dist .turbo node_modules && rm -f tsconfig.tsbuildinfo && rm -f tsconfig.tests.tsbuildinfo
